de.name: Hersteller / Eigenproduktion
de.description:
Ihr fertigt selbst — Stücklisten, Beschaffung, Lead-Times.
Mischkundschaft B2B + ggf. D2C-Direktverkauf. Lieferketten-
Risiken sind real, Materialeinsatz steuert die Marge.

emphasis.overview: Eure Fertigungstiefe ist die strategische Achse — was macht ihr selbst, was kauft ihr zu?
emphasis.masterdata: Artikel-Stammdaten mit Stücklisten, Charge/SN, MHD wo relevant.
emphasis.channels: Direktverkauf B2B + Händler-Stufen + ggf. Webshop für Endkunden.
emphasis.logistics: Wareneingang + Eigenlager + Versand. Inventur-Strategie ist Pflicht.
emphasis.systems: Schnittstellen zu PPS/MES, ggf. CAD/PLM. Kassensoftware bei Showroom.
emphasis.accounting: Materialeinsatz + Lager-Bewertung. Steuerberater muss Bestandsführung verstehen.

tasks.title: Logo + Beleg-Footer
tasks.hint: Logo (SVG/PNG) + AGB-Footer für AB · LS · RG

tasks.title: Artikel-Stammdaten mit BOM
tasks.hint: Stückliste pro Fertigprodukt + Halbfertigwaren + Lead-Time

tasks.title: Lieferanten-CSV
tasks.hint: Lieferanten + Einkaufspreise + Lead-Times + Mindestabnahmemengen

tasks.title: Charge / SN / MHD-Strategie
tasks.hint: Wo wird gepflegt — Pflichtfeld vs. optional — schriftlich festhalten

tasks.title: Wareneingang-Prozess
tasks.hint: Prüfschritte + Etikettendrucker für Lagerplätze + Reklamation

tasks.title: Fertigungs-Stationen anlegen
tasks.hint: Arbeitsplätze + Werker-Logins + Rückmeldungs-Workflow

tasks.title: Versand für Großgüter
tasks.hint: Speditionen für Paletten + Paketversand für Kleinteile

tasks.title: Inventur-Plan
tasks.hint: Stichtag oder rollende Inventur · Verantwortliche · Sperrfenster

tasks.title: Bank-Login (FinAPI/EBICS)
tasks.hint: Eingangsrechnungen-Matching + Zahlungsabgleich

tasks.title: DATEV + Bestandsbewertung
tasks.hint: Steuerberater muss Materialeinsatz + Bestandsführung verstehen

tasks.title: Test-User Produktion/Lager/Einkauf/Buchhaltung
tasks.hint: für rollenspezifische Schulung

tasks.title: Go-Live-Datum bestätigen
tasks.hint: Inkl. Inventur-Stichtag · Bestandsumstellung · Hypercare-Plan

en.name: Manufacturer / In-House Production
en.description:
You produce yourselves — bills of materials, procurement, lead
times. Mixed customer base B2B + optionally D2C direct sales.
Supply-chain risks are real, material cost drives margin.

emphasis.overview: Your manufacturing depth is the strategic axis — what do you make yourselves, what do you buy in?
emphasis.risks: Supply chain + material prices + single-source risks made explicit.
emphasis.products: Bills of materials (BOM) + variants + lead time per item.
emphasis.masterdata: Product master data with BOMs, batch/serial, expiry where relevant.
emphasis.channels: Direct B2B sales + reseller tiers + optionally webshop for end customers.
emphasis.logistics: Goods inwards + own warehouse + outbound. Stocktake strategy is mandatory.
emphasis.systems: Interfaces to MES/PPS, optionally CAD/PLM. POS software at showroom.
emphasis.accounting: Material cost + inventory valuation. Tax advisor must understand stock accounting.
emphasis.custom_agents: Order proposals, goods-inwards check, stocktake triggers — set cadence.

tasks.title: Logo + document footer
tasks.hint: Logo (SVG/PNG) + T&C footer for order confirmation · delivery note · invoice

tasks.title: Product master data with BOM
tasks.hint: Bill of materials per finished product + sub-assemblies + lead time

tasks.title: Supplier CSV
tasks.hint: Suppliers + purchase prices + lead times + minimum order quantities

tasks.title: Batch / serial / expiry strategy
tasks.hint: Where it's maintained — mandatory vs. optional — written down

tasks.title: Goods-inwards process
tasks.hint: Inspection steps + label printer for bin locations + complaint handling

tasks.title: Set up production stations
tasks.hint: Workstations + operator logins + feedback workflow

tasks.title: Shipping for bulky goods
tasks.hint: Freight forwarders for pallets + parcel shipping for small parts

tasks.title: Stocktake plan
tasks.hint: Cut-off date or rolling stocktake · owners · freeze window

tasks.title: Bank login (FinAPI/EBICS)
tasks.hint: Supplier-invoice matching + payment reconciliation

tasks.title: DATEV + inventory valuation
tasks.hint: Tax advisor must understand material cost + stock accounting

tasks.title: Test user production/warehouse/purchasing/accounting
tasks.hint: For role-specific training

tasks.title: Confirm go-live date
tasks.hint: Incl. stocktake cut-off · stock migration · hypercare plan
